name: parallel-isolated-app-testing
description: Design and run parallel isolated testing for desktop apps, menu bar apps, and local tools with shared state — maps collision surfaces, defines isolated launch contracts, creates fixture profiles, and splits non-colliding test lanes.

interface.shortDescription: Design and run parallel isolated testing for desktop apps, menu bar apps, and local tools with shared state — maps collision surfaces, defines isolated launch contracts, creates fixture profiles, and splits non-colliding test lanes.
interface.longDescription: Design and run parallel isolated testing for desktop apps, menu bar apps, and local tools with shared state — maps collision surfaces, defines isolated launch contracts, creates fixture profiles, and splits non-colliding test lanes. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Design a safe parallel isolated testing plan for this app, including collision surfaces, lane boundaries, and launcher contracts.
